en.title: What Prosperity Actually Looks Like
en.script: Imagine a Persian Gulf that trades freely with the world. Imagine the world's fourth-largest oil reserves funding schools instead of militias. Imagine eighty-five million people, half of them under thirty-five, building startups instead of fleeing. This is not a fantasy. It is arithmetic. The Iran Prosperity Project is the map. Now it's your turn to take aim.
